---
name: Idea or improvement
about: Suggest a new tool, guide, template, or a way to make something better
title: "[idea] "
labels: enhancement
---

**The idea**
What you would like to see, in a sentence or two.

**Who it helps**
Who runs into this, and when. For example, someone uploading their first dataset.

**What it would look like**
A rough sketch of the tool, guide, or change. Examples are welcome.

**Anything else**
Links, prior art, or context.
